channel.title: Gil Rodrigues - Gil Rodrigues Barbosa - Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa (gildrb)
channel.description: Gil Rodrigues is the public display name of Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, also known as Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and gildrb. He is a designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems.

item.title: Gil Rodrigues
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: Gil Rodrigues is the public display name of Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, also known as Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and gildrb. The canonical website is https://gildrb.com/.
